prompt:
A clean, translucent bucket filled with a diluted sanitizing solution, sitting on a hydroponics bench with a few submerged small parts like net pots and a short length of tubing. Tiny bubbles cling to the plastic surfaces, and a pair of nitrile-gloved hands is visible at the edge of frame placing equipment into the rinse bath, making it unmistakably a peroxide rinse step without showing any readable labels.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future hydroponics lab style: soft cinematic lighting, realistic liquid refraction, no logos, and no readable text. Keep the scene tidy, safe, and visually clear as a single-purpose sanitation setup.
